Abbreviations: Ref = referent group; VE = vaccine effectiveness.
* VE was calculated as (1 – adjusted odds ratio) × 100%, estimated using a test-negative case-control design, and age in years, race and ethnicity, sex, calendar day (days since August 29, 2024), and geographic region with age and calendar day included as natural splines. In each analysis, the vaccinated group was children who received at least 1 2024–2025 COVID-19 vaccine dose, regardless of previous COVID-19 vaccination history; the comparator group was children with no r
